title: Deploying a Digital Store on GitHub Pages: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: You're an Ethiopian digital creator struggling to sell your ebooks, courses, and art to clients worldwide. You've tried PayPal and Stripe, but their restrictions in your country have left you with no way to get paid. You're stuck between a rock and a hard place, wondering if you'll ever break through the barriers that keep your talent from reaching the global market. Meanwhile, your potential customers are left without a way to purchase your valuable creations. It's time to take matters into your own hands and find a solution that truly works for you.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This method is designed to bypass the limitations of mainstream payment processors and KYC requirements. By leveraging GitHub Pages and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can create a seamless payment and delivery pipeline that allows you to monetize your digital products without the need for intermediaries. The result is a system that's faster, more secure, and more cost-effective than anything else on the market. With this setup, you can finally start selling your digital creations to a global audience and earning the revenue you deserve. No more frustration, no more delays – just pure, unadulterated freedom to create and sell your work.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need to have a GitHub account, a basic understanding of HTML and CSS, and the Unchained Commerce Full Stack Bundle. You'll also need to have your digital products ready to sell and a clear plan for marketing and promoting your work. Don't worry if you're not an expert developer – the Full Stack Bundle includes a deployment guide and Discord support to help you every step of the way. With these tools and resources in place, you'll be well on your way to creating a thriving digital store that showcases your talents to the world.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll get access to the Core Shop Engine, which provides automated delivery and payment verification. You'll also get the Admin Dashboard, which gives you real-time analytics and transaction logs. And to top it all off, you'll get the Web3 Wallet Connect, which allows customers to make payments in their preferred cryptocurrency. By setting up your payment and delivery pipeline using these tools, you'll create a seamless experience for your customers and ensure that your digital products arrive safely in their hands.
The entire store stack — hosting, payments, delivery — has zero monthly costs after the one-time setup.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and start selling your digital products. With the Admin Dashboard, you'll be able to track your sales and monitor your analytics in real-time. You'll also be able to manage orders and respond to customer inquiries. And with the Core Shop Engine, you'll be able to automate the delivery of your products, ensuring that customers receive their purchases quickly and easily. By following these simple steps, you'll be well on your way to making your first sale and building a thriving digital business.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Now that you've got your digital store up and running, it's time to start scaling. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to priority updates and Discord support, ensuring that you stay ahead of the curve and can adapt to changing market conditions. You'll also be able to take advantage of the Admin Dashboard's advanced analytics and reporting features, which will help you identify areas for improvement and optimize your sales strategy. By scaling your digital business with the Full Stack Bundle, you'll be able to reach new heights and achieve the success you deserve.

The most common question we get is, 'Will this method work for me?' The answer is yes – if you're an Ethiopian digital creator struggling to sell your work globally, this method is designed specifically for you. By following the steps outlined in this guide, you'll be able to create a seamless payment and delivery pipeline that allows you to monetize your digital products without the need for intermediaries. And with the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have access to the tools and resources you need to succeed. So go ahead, take the first step towards creating a thriving digital business – you won't regret it.

Your Action Checklist

Before you start, make sure you have the following in place: a GitHub account, a basic understanding of HTML and CSS, and the Unchained Commerce Full Stack Bundle. Next, create your digital products and plan your marketing and promotion strategy. Once you've got these basics covered, follow these steps to set up your payment and delivery pipeline: 1) install the Core Shop Engine, 2) configure the Admin Dashboard, and 3) integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect. Finally, go live and start selling your digital products – and don't forget to monitor your analytics and track your sales using the Admin Dashboard. By following these simple steps, you'll be well on your way to creating a thriving digital business.
